rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same material api-design flaw (the two mp/mpr trivial corollaries bloating the surface around mem_stabilizer_fiber_iff, visible at ~lines 125-135 of the diff) whose removal improves the PR; their remaining points (missing inverse lemma vs. missing @[simp]) are either ungrounded in the shown MonoidHom (not GroupHom) declaration or are trivial nits that do not change the resulting merged state.
